mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menuList WHERE 1=1 AND type = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menuList (name, price, menuInfo, type ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{price}, #{menuInfo}, #{type} )
mapper.update: UPDATE menuList SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, menuInfo = #{menuInfo}, type = #{type} WHERE 1=1 AND menu_no = #{menu_no};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orderList ( name, price, isIce, size, count, resdate ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{price}, #{isIce}, #{size}, #{count} , date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orderList WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY resdate desc;
